code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut i = 0
mut acc = ""
mut has = false
mut maxv = 0
mut minv = 0

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if not string.is_empty(acc)
        match string.parse_int(acc)
        when Some(v)
          if not has
            maxv = v
            minv = v
            has = true
          else
            if v > maxv
              maxv = v
            end
            if v < minv
              minv = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        acc = ""
      end
    else
      let ch = string.from_byte(b)
      acc = "#{acc}#{ch}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(acc)
  match string.parse_int(acc)
  when Some(v)
    if not has
      maxv = v
      minv = v
      has = true
    else
      if v > maxv
        maxv = v
      end
      if v < minv
        minv = v
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("max=#{maxv}")
println("min=#{minv}")
